response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a technically capable full-stack engineer with approximately 20 years of broad experience and genuine entrepreneurial energy, but she falls significantly short of the Principal/Director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. Her AI exposure is recent and narrow—limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks in her current role—with no demonstrated history of building AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced AI/ML academic credentials, and no evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or shaping organizational AI direction. The role requires someone who operates at a director-level IC scope influencing cloud and AI strategy; her background is that of a strong senior-to-staff individual contributor developer.
strengths: ~20 years of diverse technical experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, demonstrating genuine breadth and adaptability
Active AI-agent infrastructure contributions including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks in current role, showing early movement toward the space
Entrepreneurial track record via founding GISCollective and consistent community leadership through public conference talks and multi-day workshops
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic scope — advising enterprise customers, shaping product roadmaps at organizational scale, or driving cross-company AI vision
AI expertise is recent and modest with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at meaningful scale and no advanced degree in an AI-related field
Cloud experience is peripheral (AWS CDK references, Kubernetes mentions) rather than deep platform-level cloud architecture expertise the role requires
